problem.title: Queue Using Linked List
problem.description:
Problem Statement:
Implement a Queue using a linked list supporting enqueue and dequeue operations.

Input Format:
- First line contains integer N
- Next N lines contain queue operations

Output Format:
- Print dequeued elements
- Print -1 if dequeue is attempted on an empty queue

solution.explanation: Use a circular array to simulate a queue; enqueue inserts at rear, dequeue removes from front, printing -1 when empty.
